source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/240515 ASPEN IODR FDA 대응/Abyz-FDA-20240515/#Abyz/12. Software Valiadtion Report/Stitching 평가보고서/006_Smart Stitching Auto Stitching Performance Report.docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Performance report for Smart Stitching auto stitching using images acquired by X-ray systems.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports assessment of Smart Stitching image stitching performance and acceptance criteria.
keyPoints: Test title is Smart Stitching performance per X-ray System.
Test item is assessment of stitching performance for image acquired by X-ray system.
The number of stitching images should be 2~5.
Auto stitching acceptance requires error range less than 15 pixels in both horizontal and vertical directions compared with manual stitching.
Manual stitching images are obtained from radiologist Kim Joo-Young.
Based on 2 input images, the auto stitching time is about 1 second.
If the subject moves conspicuously, the alignment is incorrect.
Auto stitching result is greatly affected by the auto stitching parameter.

entities.name: Kim Joo-Young
entities.evidence: Obtain manual stitching images from radiologist(Kim Joo-Young).

entities.name: Kodak CR975
entities.evidence: X-ray Mfr Kodak; Type CR; Model CR975

entities.name: Konica 0817
entities.evidence: X-ray Mfr Konica; Type DR; Model 0817

concepts.name: Auto stitching performance
concepts.evidence: Test Title - Smart Stitching performance per X-ray System

concepts.name: Stitching performance assessment
concepts.evidence: Test Items - Assessment of stitching performance for image acquired by X-ray system

concepts.name: Auto stitching acceptance criteria
concepts.evidence: Compared with manual stitching, the error range for auto stitching should be less than 15 pixels each in the horizontal and vertical direction.

concepts.name: Manual stitching comparison
concepts.evidence: Compared with manual stitching, the error range for auto stitching should be less than 15 pixels each in the horizontal and vertical direction.

concepts.name: DICOM image import
concepts.evidence: Download the DICOM image to a local storage. Import the locally stored image and perform the test.

concepts.name: Auto stitching parameters
concepts.evidence: The auto stitching result is greatly affected by the auto stitching parameter and the optimized parameter value may be different depending on the location of the redundant area of the image.

evidence.claim: The document title is Auto Stitching Performance Report.
evidence.evidenceText: Auto Stitching Performance Report

evidence.claim: The software title is Smart Stitching.
evidence.evidenceText: S / W Title Smart Stitching

evidence.claim: The document number is SMCW-P0801-F05.
evidence.evidenceText: Document No SMCW-P0801-F05

evidence.claim: The report author is Hyun Ji Cho.
evidence.evidenceText: Author Hyun Ji Cho

evidence.claim: The test title is Smart Stitching performance per X-ray System.
evidence.evidenceText: Test Title - Smart Stitching performance per X-ray System
evidence.pageTarget: Smart Stitching Performance Per X-ray System

evidence.claim: The test item assesses stitching performance for images acquired by an X-ray system.
evidence.evidenceText: Test Items - Assessment of stitching performance for image acquired by X-ray system

evidence.claim: The test method uses DICOM images downloaded to local storage and imported for testing.
evidence.evidenceText: Download the DICOM image to a local storage. Import the locally stored image and perform the test.

evidence.claim: The number of stitching images should be 2 to 5.
evidence.evidenceText: The number of stitching images should be 2~5.

evidence.claim: Auto stitching acceptance requires less than 15 pixels error in both horizontal and vertical directions compared with manual stitching.
evidence.evidenceText: Compared with manual stitching, the error range for auto stitching should be less than 15 pixels each in the horizontal and vertical direction.

evidence.claim: Manual stitching images are obtained from radiologist Kim Joo-Young.
evidence.evidenceText: Obtain manual stitching images from radiologist(Kim Joo-Young).

evidence.claim: For spine image capture, the number of vertebrae should be correct: C-Spine 7, T-Spine 12, L-Spine 5.
evidence.evidenceText: For Spine image capture, the number of vertebrae (C-Spine: 7, T-Spine: 12, L-Spine: 5) should be correct.

evidence.claim: Radiologist confirmation is required.
evidence.evidenceText: Get confirmation from the radiologist

evidence.claim: If there is a tape measure, it should be evenly aligned.
evidence.evidenceText: If there is a tape measure, it should be evenly aligned.

evidence.claim: Failure is assigned if any one of the listed acceptance conditions is not met.
evidence.evidenceText: If any one of 1~3 conditions is not met, it is regarded as failure.

evidence.claim: Based on 2 input images, the auto stitching time is about 1 second.
evidence.evidenceText: Based on 2 input images, the auto stitching time is about 1 second.

evidence.claim: Conspicuous subject movement causes incorrect alignment.
evidence.evidenceText: If the subject moves conspicuously, the alignment is incorrect.

evidence.claim: Auto stitching result is greatly affected by the auto stitching parameter.
evidence.evidenceText: The auto stitching result is greatly affected by the auto stitching parameter and the optimized parameter value may be different depending on the location of the redundant area of the image.

evidence.claim: Input parameters affect stitching speed.
evidence.evidenceText: Input parameters affect the stitching speed.

evidence.claim: The test condition operating system is Microsoft Windows 10 Pro 64-bit.
evidence.evidenceText: OS : Microsoft Windows 10 Pro(64bit)

evidence.claim: The test condition CPU is Intel Core i5-6500 CPU at 3.20GHz.
evidence.evidenceText: CPU : Intel(R) Core(™) i5-6500 CPU @3.20GHz 3.19GHz

evidence.claim: The test condition RAM is 8GB.
evidence.evidenceText: RAM : 8GB

evidence.claim: The test condition graphic card is NVIDIA Geforce GT 730.
evidence.evidenceText: Graphic Card : NVIDIA Geforce GT 730

evidence.claim: The test condition HDD is 1TB.
evidence.evidenceText: HDD : 1TB
